title: hypericum lissophloeus
intro: Hypericum lissophloeus, also known as shrubby St. John's Wort, is a flowering plant species in the St. John's Wort genus, native to the Mediterranean region. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin conditions, and viral infections. The health benefits of Hypericum lissophloeus include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve mood, and boost the immune system, while also exhibiting antioxidant and antimicrobial properties. Hypericum lissophloeus can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or oil, and is often used in herbal remedies for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects.
